chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S-25 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For orders on MA 217/2024 3.For hearing of bail application Mr. Naeemuddin Z. Kasmi, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Nasrullah Sahito, Advocate along with complainant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G for the State. Date of Hearing & Order: 13-05-2024 O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J., Bail applications of applicant on merits have already been admittedly dismissed by this Court as well as trial Court with certain directions given to the trial Court to expedite the trial. The case of the applicant is that still the trial has not been completed and such directions not complied with. Complainant and his counsel submit that material witnesses have been examined and it is only the official witnesses i.e. I.O, Medical Officer and Tapedar, who remain to be examined. Learned Additional P.G for the State undertakes that within three months, witnesses will be produced and examined. In view of above, with the understanding of all parties, the trial Court is directed not to grant any adjournment to any party and conclude the trial within three months. After which, in any case, the applicant would be at liberty to file a fresh application for same relief, which, if filed, shall be decided on its own merits, independent of previous orders either passed by this Court or trial Court. This application is accordingly dismissed in the above terms. Office to communicate copy of this order to the office of APG for a perusal and compliance. JUDGE Ahmad
